name: ved
description: An Electron application with React and TypeScript
author: example.com

scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:node && pnpm run typecheck:web
scripts.smoke: node test/e2e/smoke.ts && node test/e2e/placeholder.ts && node test/e2e/ruby-reveal.ts && node test/e2e/caret-boundary.ts && node test/e2e/caret-end-ruby.ts && node test/e2e/click-end-ruby.ts && node test/e2e/ruby-ime-rect.ts && node test/e2e/edit-markup.ts && node test/e2e/pbt-edit.ts && node test/e2e/pbt-caret.ts && node test/e2e/undo-redo.ts && node test/e2e/select-all-arrow.ts && node test/e2e/line-movement.ts && node test/e2e/line-move-multirow.ts && node test/e2e/ruby-line-move.ts && node test/e2e/line-move-first-para.ts && node test/e2e/line-move-edge.ts && node test/e2e/line-move-doc-end.ts && node test/e2e/line-overlay.ts && node test/e2e/line-highlight-para-end.ts && node test/e2e/line-highlight-empty.ts && node test/e2e/caret-move-perf.ts && node test/e2e/writing-mode-rows.ts && node test/e2e/tabs.ts && node test/e2e/tab-keys.ts && node test/e2e/tab-close-cancel.ts
